title: Grassy Wholesome Gelly Bake
description: A glassy-jelly dessert featuring oats and other wholesome ingredients that satisfy midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil for greasing the baking dish

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a smallish cake pan with vegetable oil.
In a saucepan, mix oats and coconut milk. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until thickened, about 2 minutes.
Add agave nectar or honey and salt. Stir well. Remove from heat. Add mint leaves and lemon juice; stir gently but thoroughly so as not to break up pearls.
Pour mixture into greased pan. Place in preheated oven. Bake for 15-20 minutes until set, stirring occasionally with a spatula near the edges only.
